conservative.name: Death's Hymn
conservative.requirements: 6 favour. Target within medium range. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: The icy fear of death grips your target. He suffers 1 stress and 1 fatigue
As above, and he gains the Frightened condition until the end of your next turn
Your target suffers 2 stress, 2 fatigue, and gains the Frightened condition until the end of your next turn

boon.description: For each stress the target suffers, you recover 1 stress

bane.description: Your target may immediately perform a free manoeuvre

sigmarsComet.description: Until the end of the encounter, the target suffers to any Fear or Terror checks

reckless.name: Death's Hymn
reckless.requirements: 6 favour. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to your dice pool

success.description: Your hymn calls up images of final death.Each enemy within close range suffers 1 stress and 1 fatigue
As above, but out to medium range
As above, but out to long range

boon.description: Each enemy affected by this blessing suffers 1 additional stress and 1 additional fatigue

bane.description: You suffer 1 stress per enemy affected by this blessing

sigmarsComet.description: Each enemy affected by this blessing suffers 1 additional stress and 1 additional fatigue
